EventHandler.Name: CheckAddLoc
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCycles.ItemlocValidateSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR V(FormCurWhse), VAR P(Loc), VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR, MESSAGE, RVAR V(ItemlocValidatePromptMsg), RVAR V(ItemlocValidatePromptButtons), VAR 0, RVAR) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CheckAddLoc
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItemLocs.ItemLocAddSp( PARMS(VAR V(FormCurWhse), VAR P(Item), VAR P(Loc), VAR 0, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR 0, RVAR, MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mValidatorMethodMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CheckAddLot
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPhyinvs.PhyinvLotV2Sp( PARMS(VAR V(FormCurWhse), VAR P(Item), VAR P(Loc), VAR P(Lot), UI1 1, MESSAGE, RVAR V(InvAddPrompt), RVAR V(InvAddPromptButtons), VAR ) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CreateLot
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCycles.PhyinvLotV2Sp( PARMS(VAR V(FormCurWhse), VAR P(Item), VAR P(Loc), VAR P(Lot), VAR 2, MESSAGE, RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR V(PromptButtons), VAR ) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CreateSerNum
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCycles.PhyinvSerialV2Sp( PARMS(VAR V(FormCurWhse), VAR P(Item), VAR P(Loc), VAR P(Lot), VAR P(SerNum), VAR 2, MESSAGE, RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR V(PromptButtons), VAR P(ImportDocId)) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchContainersAsModal
EventHandler.Response: Containers( FILTER(Whse = FV(FormCurWhse) AND Loc = FP(Loc) and ConitemItem = FP(Item) AND ISNULL(ConitemItemLot,CHAR(1)) = ISNULL(FP(Lot),CHAR(1))) SETVARVALUES(InitialCommand=Refresh) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormCalledFormReturned
EventHandler.Response: SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On_x0D_ Option Strict On_x0D_ _x0D_ Imports System_x0D_ Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic_x0D_ Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol_x0D_ Imports Mongoose.Scripting_x0D_ _x0D_ Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts_x0D_ Public Class EvHandler_StdFormCalledFormReturned_0_x0D_ Inherits GlobalScript_x0D_ _x0D_ Sub Main()_x0D_ If ThisForm.LastModalChildEndedOk = True Then_x0D_ ' if the user hit cancel on the modal form,_x0D_ ' there is no need to continue_x0D_ If ThisForm.La
EventHandler.Response2: stModalChildName = ThisForm.Variables("ChangeWarehouse").Value Then_x0D_ ThisForm.GenerateEvent("ChangeFormCaption")_x0D_ End If_x0D_ End If_x0D_ End Sub_x0D_ End Class_x0D_ End Namespace_x0D_ )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLParms.GetDataTypeLengthSp( PARMS(BSTR LotType, RVAR V(LotLength), MESSAGE) )
